why_not_live_ready: The strengthened replay set still shows referral_needed runtime accuracy at 1.0.
The candidate referral-needed-only override still produces a false override.
The only improvement signal remains concentrated in the narrow 'narrow specialist' wording split.
That means the rule is still too brittle to promote without risking theft from stable routing behavior.

routing_arrangement_examples: մասնագետի համար նախ բժիշկ պիտի տեսնե՞մ
eligibility_examples: մասնագետի մոտ անվճար կարո՞ղ եմ գնալ
protected_neighbor_check.result: Neighbors remained stable and therefore must remain excluded from any future pilot rule.

future_rule_requirements_before_reconsid: A referral-needed-only rule must explain the 'narrow specialist' wording split without stealing routing/arrangement prompts.
The rule must remain fully inactive on any free-care or coverage phrasing.
Replay evidence must show improvement on more than one repeated disagreement family.
Any future pilot candidate must keep low-confidence and mixed cases on the runtime winner.

recommendation.reason: The strengthened replay is more decision-grade but still not live-ready.
